findings.issue: EOD update duplicated: setInterval fires at 16:59, but same endpoint called again in main scheduler at hour 17 (line 329-337)
findings.suggestion: Remove the 5PM fetch call or consolidate into single EOD logic to avoid double-triggering
findings.est_impact: Redundant API calls, potential race conditions on account state updates

findings.issue: RSS feed polling makes two sequential HTTP requests per item (scan-context, then intake) without checking if first response indicates rejection—wasted bandwidth
findings.suggestion: Only call intake endpoint if scan-context explicitly returns affirmative match
findings.est_impact: Token waste on unnecessary API calls for rejected opportunities

findings.issue: post() helper at line 13 is not used; fetch with manual JSON.stringify repeated 8+ times (lines 89, 120, 227, 265, 269, 313, 323, 330, 345, 350)
findings.suggestion: Use post() helper consistently instead of raw fetch calls
findings.est_impact: Harder to maintain, inconsistent error handling

findings.issue: Discord scrape at 2AM fires without awaiting—runScraper runs async but .catch() means errors silently logged; no retry or alert if it fails
findings.suggestion: Add explicit error logging or notify endpoint call on scrape failure
findings.est_impact: Silent failures reduce visibility into data collection gaps
